full_text:
Kuai Liang (Zirou) 蒯良 (子柔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kuai Liang (蒯良), styledZirou (子柔). Adviser of Liu Biao. Came up with the plan that resulted in Sun Jian’s death. Kuai Liang was affiliated with Liu Biao.
